strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Diverse technical skills across multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and agentic AI at scale
No clear evidence of experience in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical expertise and experience in AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in fintech and scaling large engineering teams.
